---
title: "teacup demo"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
filters:
  - teacup
---

Diagrams below are inline SVG in the DOM: ink is `currentColor`, accents are
CSS variables, and the size is in `em` so diagrams track the surrounding font
size. Toggle dark mode to see labels and colors follow the theme.

## Linear map as a commutative square

```{.tikz}
\begin{tikzpicture}[node distance=2.4cm, >=Stealth]
  \node (V) {$V$};
  \node (W) [right=of V] {$W$};
  \node (Vq) [below=of V] {$V/\ker T$};
  \node (im) [below=of W] {$\operatorname{im}\,T$};
  \draw[->, thick, accent] (V) -- node[above] {$T$} (W);
  \draw[->] (V) -- node[left] {$\pi$} (Vq);
  \draw[->, accent2] (Vq) -- node[below] {$\bar T$} (im);
  \draw[{Hooks[right]}->] (im) -- node[right] {$\iota$} (W);
\end{tikzpicture}
```

## Vectors in the plane

Inline text for size comparison: the labels $u$, $v$, $u+v$ should match this
paragraph's rendered math size.

```{.tikz}
\begin{tikzpicture}[scale=1.2, >=Stealth]
  \draw[muted, ->] (-0.5,0) -- (4,0) node[below] {$x$};
  \draw[muted, ->] (0,-0.5) -- (0,3) node[left] {$y$};
  \draw[->, thick, accent]  (0,0) -- (3,1)   node[midway, below right] {$u$};
  \draw[->, thick, accent2] (0,0) -- (1,2)   node[midway, above left]  {$v$};
  \draw[->, thick, accent3] (0,0) -- (4,3)   node[above right] {$u+v$};
  \draw[dashed, muted] (3,1) -- (4,3);
  \draw[dashed, muted] (1,2) -- (4,3);
\end{tikzpicture}
```

## Width override

Same figure forced to 30% column width via `width="30%"`:

```{.tikz width="30%"}
\draw[thick, accent] (0,0) circle (1);
\draw[->] (0,0) -- (45:1) node[midway, above left] {$r$};
```
